issue.name: SQL injection
issue.issueDetail: The id parameter appears to be vulnerable to SQL injection based on database error responses.
issue.remediationBackground: Use parameterized queries, avoid dynamic SQL construction, and add regression tests for injection payloads.

issue.name: Missing Content Security Policy
issue.issueDetail: The application does not define a Content-Security-Policy response header.
issue.remediationBackground: Deploy a restrictive Content Security Policy and monitor violations before enforcing.
